# Varity Docs

> Varity is predictable cloud hosting for supported Node, Python, Go, static, AI agent, and runnable Docker/OCI HTTP service deployments.

Use these docs as the public Varity documentation context. Current MCP install command:

```bash
claude mcp add varity -- npx -y @varity-labs/mcp
```

## Current MCP Tools

- `varity_agent_info`
- `varity_build`
- `varity_cost_calculator`
- `varity_create_repo`
- `varity_delete_deployment`
- `varity_deploy`
- `varity_deploy_agent`
- `varity_deploy_logs`
- `varity_deploy_status`
- `varity_dev_server`
- `varity_doctor`
- `varity_install_deps`
- `varity_list_agents`
- `varity_login`
- `varity_migrate`
- `varity_open_browser`
- `varity_redeploy`
- `varity_search_docs`
- `varity_set_env`

## Pages

- [Varity MCP Server](https://docs.varity.so/ai-tools/mcp-server-spec/): Install and configure the Varity MCP server for AI editors. A full set of tools for building, deploying, and managing apps via Cursor or Claude Code.
- [AI Tools for Varity](https://docs.varity.so/ai-tools/overview/): Accelerate Varity development with AI tools. Copy-paste prompts, Cursor rules, MCP server integration, and LLM-optimized documentation.
- [AI Prompts](https://docs.varity.so/ai-tools/prompts/): Ready-to-paste prompts for deploying to Varity from Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or ChatGPT. No commands to memorize.
- [varitykit login / auth](https://docs.varity.so/cli/commands/auth/): Log in to Varity from the CLI with varitykit login. Uses deploy keys from the developer portal for app deployment and domain management.
- [varitykit app deploy](https://docs.varity.so/cli/commands/deploy/): Deploy static sites and dynamic apps with varitykit app deploy. Supports static and dynamic hosting with automatic framework detection.
- [varitykit doctor](https://docs.varity.so/cli/commands/doctor/): Run varitykit doctor to validate your development environment. Checks required tools (Node.js, npm, git), system resources, project config, and network.
- [CLI](https://docs.varity.so/cli/): The Varity CLI. Deploy and manage apps from the terminal.
- [VarityKit CLI Overview](https://docs.varity.so/cli/overview/): VarityKit CLI overview: deploy apps, run diagnostics, and manage domains. A familiar Python-based deploy CLI.
- [Auto-wired Services](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/auto-wired-services/): Varity reads your dependencies and automatically provisions the databases and services your app needs. No configuration required.
- [App URLs and Names](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/custom-domains/): Set your Varity app name. Static apps use varity.app/{name}, and dynamic apps use {name}.varity.app.
- [Databases & Data](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/databases/): How Varity provisions databases for your app, the connection details it injects, and the honest durability boundary in beta.
- [Deploy a Docker Image](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/deploy-docker-image/): Deploy public or private runnable Docker images to Varity from the CLI, the Developer Portal, or your AI coding tool. No repo and no build step required.
- [Deploy from the Dashboard](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/deploy-from-dashboard/): Deploy a GitHub repo, a Docker image, or a ready-made template from the Varity developer dashboard without using the command line.
- [Deploy Your Application](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/deploy-your-app/): Deploy your application to Varity with one CLI command. Automatic builds, a live varity.app URL, and a predictable flat monthly bill.
- [Debugging Failed Deployments](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/deployment-troubleshooting/): Diagnose failed Varity deployments with logs, common error patterns, and redeploy recovery steps.
- [Environment Variables](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/env-variables/): Configure environment variables for Varity deployments. Inject custom API keys via .env.varity. Most Varity credentials are managed automatically.
- [Deploy](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/): Deploy your app with Varity. One command, live in minutes.
- [Zero-Configuration Deployment](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/intelligent-orchestration/): Varity automatically configures deployment for your app with minimal setup and clear hosting defaults.
- [Managed Credentials](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/managed-credentials/): Varity auto-provides database, storage, and service credentials at every stage. No third-party accounts, no API key setup, no .env configuration.
- [Recover a Previous Version](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/rollback/): Recover after a bad Varity deploy by redeploying a known-good version under the same app name.
- [Supported Frameworks](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/supported-frameworks/): Which frameworks Varity supports today, what gets auto-detected, and how to request support for languages not yet available.
- [Migrate from Vercel to Varity](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/vercel-migration/): Move your existing Vercel app to Varity in under 3 minutes. The CLI and MCP tools handle code transforms, dependency cleanup, and deployment automatically.
- [What You Can Deploy Today](https://docs.varity.so/deploy/what-you-can-deploy/): An honest snapshot of what Varity deploys today, what is beta, and what is not ready yet.
- [Getting Help](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/getting-help/): Find help with Varity through documentation, Discord, and GitHub.
- [How Varity Works](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/how-varity-works/): How Varity deploys supported source apps and runnable Docker services from project detection to a live URL.
- [Getting Started](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/): Get started with Varity. Deploy supported source apps, AI agents, and runnable Docker services.
- [Installation](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/installation/): Install the Varity MCP server and varitykit CLI for the current public MVP deploy flow.
- [Introduction](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/introduction/): Varity is predictable cloud hosting for supported source apps, AI agents, and runnable Docker services.
- [Next.js Quick Start](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/quickstart-nextjs/): Deploy a Next.js app to Varity. Varity detects your framework and wires hosting and databases automatically.
- [Python Quick Start](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/quickstart-python/): Deploy a FastAPI, Django, or Flask app to Varity. Varity detects your framework and wires hosting and databases automatically.
- [Quick Start](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/quickstart/): Get started with Varity in minutes. Migrate an existing app, deploy from your repo, or deploy with AI tools.
- [Why Varity](https://docs.varity.so/getting-started/why-varity/): Why Varity over usage-metered cloud platforms. Predictable pricing, automatic deploys, and auto-wired services.
- [Deploy from Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf](https://docs.varity.so/guides/deploy-from-ai-ide/): Deploy supported apps and runnable Docker services from your AI editor with the Varity MCP server.
- [Deploy a Next.js App](https://docs.varity.so/guides/deploy-nextjs/): Predictable cloud hosting for a Next.js app with a database. One command. Flat monthly bill that does not grow with traffic.
- [Varity Documentation](https://docs.varity.so/): Predictable cloud hosting for Node, Python, Go, static apps, AI agents, and runnable Docker services.
- [Billing](https://docs.varity.so/resources/billing/): How Varity billing works, with a card on file before your first deploy and a flat monthly price per app that doesn't change with traffic.
- [FAQ](https://docs.varity.so/resources/faq/): Frequently asked questions about Varity: deployment workflow, supported frameworks, and pricing model.
- [Glossary](https://docs.varity.so/resources/glossary/): Definitions of key Varity terms: deploy keys, managed credentials, deployment IDs, static hosting, dynamic hosting, and MCP tools.
- [Pricing and Costs](https://docs.varity.so/resources/pricing/): Pricing model overview for Varity. Compare Varity's fixed reserved-hardware pricing with usage-metered cloud billing.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.varity.so/resources/troubleshooting/): Fix common Varity issues: CLI not found, build errors, authentication failures, deployment problems, and database connection troubleshooting.
- [Build an App Using Only AI (No Code Required)](https://docs.varity.so/tutorials/build-with-ai/): Build and deploy an app with your AI editor. Varity MCP handles setup checks, the deploy workflow, and cost estimation.
- [Deploy an AI Agent or LLM App](https://docs.varity.so/tutorials/deploy-ai-agent/): Step-by-step guide to deploying a Python or Node.js AI agent on Varity. Auto-detected compute and optional local model server included.
